title: T-053 — UI: TEC-087 Tooling/Equipment Setup List
prompt: Build tooling/equipment setup list per §12A. Generic equipment configuration list (oven config / reactor setup / dieset). Match `tooling_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:314-352. UX-MISSING — parity reference falls back to prototype. RED tests/ui/tec-087-tooling.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-087-tooling.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.details: List + create/edit drawer. Uses generic ext_jsonb storage on a tooling_setups table — assumed to exist in 02-SETTINGS or be created via existing reference_schemas.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:314-352, then list columns, search, and Create CTA match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given empty state, when rendered, then empty copy and Create CTA appear.
Given Create clicked, when submitted, then row appears in list.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + create flow.
risk_red_lines: Do not invent fields beyond prototype.
